title: PayPal Holdings Inc Posts Strong Earnings Growth In Q4 2023
text: PayPal delivered strong financial results for Q4 and full year 2023. The company achieved a 9% increase in Q4 revenue reaching $8.0 billion, while full-year revenue climbed 8% to $29.8 billion. GAAP earnings per share surged 84% to $3.84 for the full year, while non-GAAP EPS increased 24% to $5.10. Q4 total payment volume surged 15% to $409.8 billion, with full-year TPV increasing 13% to $1.53 trillion. PayPal maintained a strong balance sheet with $17.3 billion in cash and investments. The company returned $5.0 billion to shareholders through repurchases during the year. Management expects Q1 2024 net revenue growth of approximately 6.5%-7% on an FX-neutral basis.
